About CNC Auto Service

A family-owned auto repair shop built on honesty, hard work, and treating every customer like a neighbor.

Our Story

CNC Auto Service & Used Tires opened its doors in Lilburn, Georgia in 2012 with a simple goal: provide Metro Atlanta drivers with honest, quality auto repair at a fair price. Over a decade later, that mission hasn't changed.

We're a full-service shop handling everything from oil changes and brake jobs to auto body repair, collision work, and tire replacement. Our technicians take the time to explain what's wrong and what it'll take to fix it - no upselling, no surprises.

Located on Pleasant Hill Rd, we're proud to be the go-to auto shop for families across Lilburn, Snellville, Norcross, and the greater Atlanta area.

Our Services

Whatever your vehicle needs, we handle it.

Auto Body & Collision

Expert dent repair, paint matching, and collision restoration.

Brakes & Tires

Brake pads, rotors, new & used tires, alignments, and rotations.

Diagnostics & Electrical

Computer diagnostics, check engine light, wiring, and sensor repairs.

A/C & Heating

A/C recharge, heater repair, and full climate system service.

Oil Changes & Maintenance

Routine oil changes and scheduled maintenance for all makes & models.

Emissions & Inspections

Georgia emissions testing and vehicle inspections, fast and reliable.

Ready to bring your car in?
